positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a soaring phoenix taking flight, composed within a stylized crest or shield shape. The phoenix is rendered in sharp, contrasting linework, primarily utilizing deep blues, fiery oranges, and stark gold accents against a clean, negative space background. Incorporate repeating mandala patterns or tribal-inspired geometric elements radiating outward from the bird's tail and wings. The style should be highly detailed vector art, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts. Perfect composition for centered apparel print, high contrast, clean silhouettes, symmetrical arrangement, graphic novel quality. Cinematic studio lighting, 8k resolution.
